aether_core_elements_table.description: Roll d8 to determine Aether-Core element

entries.found_in: Vortex beasts, coastal creatures, sky predators
Stone-Blood regions, mountain beasts, Ferrum constructs
Northern wastes, Frost Drakes, Deep-Blood territories
Aether-warped creatures, random encounters, chaotic zones

aether_core_tiers.use: Cantrip focus, weapon coating (+1d4 elemental for 1 attack)
7th-9th level spell focus, legendary item crafting

entries.treasure: 1d4 GC + 3d6 SS + Fractured Aether-Core (roll d8 for element)
3d6 GC + Intact Aether-Core (roll d8 for element)
2d6 GC + 1 minor magic item (roll on Magic Item Table A)
3d6 GC + 1 Intact Core + roll on Magic Item Table B
2d6 GC + Pristine Aether-Core (roll d8 for element)
4d6 GC + roll on Magic Item Table C
4d6 GC + roll on Magic Item Table D
4d6 GC + roll on Magic Item Table E
4d6 GC + roll on Magic Item Table F + 1 Sovereign-Fragment Core
5d6 GC + roll on Magic Item Table D
5d6 GC + roll on Magic Item Table E
5d6 GC + roll on Magic Item Table F
5d6 GC + roll on Magic Item Table G
5d6 GC + roll on Magic Item Table H
5d6 GC + roll on Magic Item Table I + 1d2 Sovereign-Fragment Cores

dragon_hoards.magic_items: Roll on Magic Item Table A
Roll on Magic Item Table B
Roll on Magic Item Table D
dragon_hoards.art_objects: 2d4 Art Objects (Table O) + House Signet Ring

dragon_hoards.magic_items: Roll on Magic Item Table G
Roll on Magic Item Tables H + I

faction_hoards.specialty_loot: Flametongue weapons, military commissions, scorched-earth maps
Inquisitor Seals, blood purity records, blackmail documents, Law-Bound weapons
+1 armor, shield wall tactical manuals, uncut Aether-Cores
Sky-charts, navigation tools, Storm-Channeled weapons, imported goods
Flesh-fusion components, Void-Touched weapons, illegal research notes, preserved body parts
Inquisitorial Smite scrolls, saint relics (Aether Purifier x10), tithing records
Prophecy fragments, Penitent's Chains, illegal printing press, contact lists

entries.find: Dragon-Bone Relic (25 GC art object)
Fractured Aether-Core (roll d8 element)
Ancient Text (historical lore, 50 GC to scholar)
Preserved Sovereign Scale (500 GC, enchanting component)
Map fragment to nearby dragon lair
Intact Aether-Core (roll element)
Roll on Magic Item Table B
Pre-Five-Sovereign Artifact (1,000+ GC, historical)
Cult of the Sixth prophecy fragment (plot item)
Roll on Magic Item Table D
2d6 GC in loose coins / forgotten purse
House Signet Ring (25-100 GC based on House)
Inquisitor's Seal (legal spellcasting permit)
Blackmail document (plot hook)
Minor enchanted jewelry (50 GC)
Trade contract worth 2d6 × 10 GC
Roll on Magic Item Table A
Blood purity record of a known NPC (plot info)
Forgery Kit with House seals
Roll on Magic Item Table C
1d4 GC in coins dropped by travelers
Healing herbs (2d4 Potions of Healing equivalent)
Fractured Aether-Core (Wild element)
Abandoned campsite: 2d6 SS + 1d4 rations
Monster part (25-100 GC to alchemist)
Old shrine: 2d4 GC offering + 1 minor blessing
Roll on Magic Item Table A
Map to nearby dungeon entrance
Petrified dragon egg (500 GC, inert but valuable)
Roll on Magic Item Table B
3d6 CF (commoner trail)
Sump-Ration cache (7 days of food, terrible taste)
Cult of the Sixth pamphlet (illegal, plot info)
Intact Aether-Core (Void element)
Smuggler's stash: 2d6 GC + contraband goods
Dragon-Bone fragment (100 GC, spell component)
Roll on Magic Item Table B (Void-Touched items common)
Abandoned Tenebris lab equipment (Alchemist's Supplies, rare reagents)
Sump-Blood treasure map (leads to hidden cache)
Roll on Magic Item Table D
1d6 GC in mineral flakes
Uncut gemstone (10-100 GC based on d10)
Fractured Aether-Core (Earth or Fire element)
Abandoned mining claim (tools, 3d6 GC in ore)
Fossilized dragon bone (250 GC, museum/library)
House Pyre forge-cache: Smith's Tools + 2d6 GC
Roll on Magic Item Table C (heavy armor/weapons)
Intact Aether-Core (Earth element)
Dragon chain fragment (plot item — who broke free?)
Roll on Magic Item Table E
2d6 SS in trade coins
Imported exotic goods (50-200 GC value)
Vortex navigation chart (reveals hidden island)
Intact Aether-Core (Storm element)
Shipwreck salvage: 2d6 × 10 GC in trade goods
Storm-Channeled weapon (uncommon)
Roll on Magic Item Table B
Message in bottle — SOS from Vortex outpost
Pristine Aether-Core (Storm element)
Roll on Magic Item Table D
Frost-resistant ration cache (7 days)
Intact Aether-Core (Frost element)
Preserved ancient specimen (500 GC to Tenebris)
Abandoned House Tenebris flesh-lab: 2d6 × 10 GC in rare components
Frost-Walker pelt (250 GC, cold resistance cloak)
Map to frozen Sovereign grave (plot hook)
Roll on Magic Item Table B
Void-Touched weapon (uncommon, see equipment_guide.md Part 4 enchantments)
Living specimen in stasis (companion or danger)
Roll on Magic Item Table E

entries.item: Aether Purifier, Minor — Potion of Healing (2d4+2)
Scroll: Cantrip (any class, requires 15%+ purity to read)
Dragon-Bone Charm — Advantage on 1 Spell Safety save, crumbles after use
Pyre Lantern — Alchemical, burns indefinitely, 30 ft. bright / 60 ft. dim
+1 Arrow/Bolt (1d4 found, single-use +1 to attack and damage)
Core Injector Kit — Holds 3 Fractured cores, +1d4 elemental damage for 3 attacks as bonus action
Blood Crystal Testing Kit — Single-use portable Ascension test, 95% accuracy, illegal without Obsidian permit
Inquisitor's Seal — Legal spellcasting permit in Obsidian territory
Cloak of the Sump — Advantage on Stealth in urban/underground (re-flavored Cloak of Elvenkind)
Minor Enchanted Weapon — Blaze-Infused or Storm-Channeled (choose), requires 10% purity
2d4 Potions of Greater Healing (4d4+4) — Aether Purifier, Major
+1 Weapon (masterwork, no purity required)
+1 Shield — Ferrum standard-issue
Scroll: 1st-level spell (15%+ purity to cast, Spell Safety applies)
Intact Aether-Core (choose element)
Boots of the Ridge — Ignore difficult terrain in mountains (re-flavored Boots of Striding and Springing)
Goggles of the Deep Sump — Darkvision 60 ft. (re-flavored Goggles of Night)
Aether-Sack — Bag of Holding, 500 lb. capacity, 64 cu. ft.
+1 Armor — Ferrum standard-issue
Void-Touched Weapon — +1d6 necrotic, crit prevents target HP recovery for 1 round, 25% purity required
Aether-Warded Armor — Reduce Aether Burn by 1d6, 1/long rest reroll failed Spell Safety save, 10% purity required

table_c.description: Rare — CR 5-10 hoards. +1 weapons with Minor enchants, Dragon-Scaled armor, Pristine cores, elemental resistance rings.

entries.item: +1 Blaze-Infused Weapon — +1d4 fire damage, glows orange when drawn, 10% purity required. House Ignis forge.
+1 Storm-Channeled Weapon — Returns when thrown, +20 ft. range, static crackle, 10% purity required. House Vortex forge.
+1 Law-Bound Weapon — +1 vs chaotic-aligned, glows blue near lies, 10% purity required. House Obsidian forge.
Dragon-Scaled Armor — +1 AC, resistance to one element (chosen at forging), 25% purity required.
Pristine Aether-Core (choose element from d8 table)
Ring of Elemental Warding — Resistance to one element (choose), 15% purity required. Re-flavored Ring of Resistance.
Scroll: 2nd-level spell (25%+ purity to cast, Spell Safety DC applies)
Aether-Warded Shield — +1 AC, reduce Aether Burn by 1d6, 1/long rest reroll failed Spell Safety save.
Wand of the Sump-Seer — Detect magic at will as an action, 15% purity required.
Sovereign-Era Gold Ring — +1 to all Spell Safety saves, 10% purity required.
Void-Touched Armor — +1 AC, 1d6 necrotic damage to attacker on melee hit, 25% purity required. House Tenebris forge.
Storm-Channeled +1 Weapon with Pristine Storm Core — Returns when thrown, +20 ft. range, +1 attack/damage, Pristine Storm Core included.

table_d.description: Rare — CR 11-16. +2 weapons, Greater enchants, Sovereign weapons, spell scrolls 2nd-3rd level.

entries.item: +2 Weapon (masterwork, no purity required)
Sovereign's Edge Weapon — +2 attack/damage, reduce Spell Safety DC by 2 when used as focus, 50% purity required. Lost Sovereign technique.
Dragon-Scaled Armor +1 — +1 AC (base) + resistance to one element, 25% purity required.
Scroll: 3rd-level spell (25%+ purity to cast, Spell Safety DC applies)
1d3 Pristine Aether-Cores (choose elements from d8 table)
Mirage-Weave Cloak — Attacks against wearer have disadvantage until first hit each round. 10% purity. Re-flavored Cloak of Displacement.
Inquisitor's Ward-Ring — +1 AC and +1 to all saves. 15% purity required. Re-flavored Ring of Protection.
Vortex Wind-Bracers — +2 damage on ranged weapon attacks, 10% purity required. Re-flavored Bracers of Archery.
Sovereign-Fragment Core (choose element from d8 table)
+2 Armor — Ferrum masterwork plate.
Greater Void-Touched Weapon — +2 attack/damage, +2d6 necrotic on hit, 50% purity required. House Tenebris forge.

table_e.description: Very Rare — CR 11-16 hoards. +2 armor, Sovereign-Mantle armor, legendary creature parts, spell scrolls 4th-5th level.

entries.item: +2 Armor — Ferrum Iron-Bound masterwork plate.
Sovereign Mantle Armor — +2 AC, when reduced to 0 HP drop to 1 HP instead (1/long rest), 50% purity required.
+2 Sovereign's Edge Weapon — +3 total, reduce Spell Safety DC by 2 when used as focus, 50% purity required.
Scroll: 4th-level spell (50%+ purity to cast, Spell Safety DC applies)
Scroll: 5th-level spell (50%+ purity required, Spell Safety DC applies)
Preserved Sovereign Scale — 500 GC enchanting component. Used to craft Sovereign-tier enchantments.
Drake-Heart Amulet — Once per long rest, gain fire resistance for 1 hour. 25% purity required.
+2 Shield with Aether-Warded enchantment — +3 AC total, reduce Aether Burn by 1d6, 1/long reroll Spell Safety.
Frost-Walker Pelt Cloak — Cold resistance permanently while worn, 25% purity required. Made from Frost-Walker hide.
Ring of Spell Storing — Holds up to 3 spell levels, 25% purity to store/retrieve. Re-flavored as 'Aether-Ring'.
Vortex Sky-Mount Hippogriff Egg — Hatches in 2d4 weeks. Requires House Vortex license or face execution.
Wyvern-Scale Half Plate — AC 15 + DEX (max 2), fire resistance, 15% purity. Scion-hunter trophy armor.

table_f.description: Very Rare — CR 17+. +3 weapons, Pristine cores in quantity, attribute-boosting items (re-flavored).

entries.item: +3 Weapon (masterwork, no purity required)
+3 Sovereign's Edge Weapon — +4 total, reduce Spell Safety DC by 2 when used as focus, 50% purity required.
2d6 Pristine Aether-Cores (choose elements from d8 table)
Sovereign's Mantle Armor +1 — +3 AC total, 1/long rest survive fatal blow at 1 HP, 50% purity required.
Gauntlets of the Blood-Ogre — STR set to 19 while worn, 25% purity required. Stone-Blood lineage.
Circlet of the Archon — INT set to 19 while worn, 25% purity required. Citadel-crafted.
Amulet of the Sixth — CHA set to 19 while worn, 25% purity required. Cult of the Sixth origin (illegal to own).
2d4 Sovereign-Kin Scales — 500 GC each, Sovereign-tier enchanting material.
+3 Shield — Ferrum Wall-Shield, masterwork.
Pristine Aether-Core Set — One of each of the 8 elements (complete collection).
+3 Void-Touched Great Weapon — +3 attack/damage, +2d6 necrotic, crit prevents healing, 50% purity required. Tenebris masterwork.

table_g.description: Legendary — CR 17+ hoards. Sovereign's Edge weapons, God-Forged minor items, spell scrolls 6th-7th level.

entries.item: God-Forged +3 Weapon — +3 attack/damage, ignores all damage resistances, DC 18 CON save or +3d6 elemental of wielder's draconic affinity on hit. Phases through non-living matter. 90% purity required. Priceless.
Sovereign's Edge +3 Greatsword (True Steel Blade) — +5 total, -2 Spell Safety DC as focus, 50% purity.
Scroll: 6th-level spell (90%+ purity required, Spell Safety DC applies)
Scroll: 7th-level spell (90%+ purity required, Spell Safety DC applies)
1d4 Sovereign-Fragment Cores (choose elements from d8 table)
God-Forged Shield — +3 AC, immune to Aether Burn, 1/long rest cast 5th-level spell without Spell Safety check. 90% purity required.
Dragon-Sovereign Heart Core — Sovereign-Fragment tier, Fire element, usable as 9th-level spell focus. Glows with living flame.
Crown of the Sump-King — +2 to all CHA checks with underworld figures, commands respect in Sump-Canals. 25% purity. Unique.
Void-Walker's Stride Boots — Teleport 30 ft. as bonus action 3/long rest, 50% purity required. Tenebris artifact.
Sovereign-Kin Egg (Petrified) — 7,500 GC art object. If reanimated... plot hook.
God-Forged Minor Item — Ring of the Sovereign Spark: Once per week, cast Wish with limited scope (DM's discretion). 90% purity required. Priceless.

table_h.description: Legendary — CR 17+. God-Shroud armor pieces, Sovereign-Fragment cores, artifact-quality items.

entries.item: God-Shroud Plate Armor — +3 AC, immune to Aether Burn, 1/long rest cast 5th-level spell without Spell Safety check. 90% purity required. Priceless.
God-Shroud Half Plate — +3 AC (15 + DEX max 2 base), immune to Aether Burn, 1/long rest free 5th-level cast. 90% purity.
2d4 Sovereign-Fragment Cores (choose elements from d8 table)
Sovereign Mantle +2 Full Plate — 20 AC base, survive fatal blow at 1 HP 1/long rest, 50% purity required.
Sword of the Five Skulls — +3 longsword, casts Inquisitorial Smite (5th-level) on hit 1/long rest, 50% purity. Church of Five Skulls relic.
Mantle of the Abyss — +2 AC cloak, resistance to Void and Flesh damage, 50% purity. Tenebris masterwork.
The Iron Crown of Ferrum — +3 AC when worn with heavy armor, STR set to 23. 50% purity required. Ferrum house heirloom.
Storm-Sovereign's Vambrace — Cast Call Lightning (4th-level) 3/long rest, 50% purity required. Vortex artifact.
Pyre-Father's Anvil Gauntlets — Unarmed strikes deal 2d6 fire + 2d6 bludgeoning, 50% purity. Ignis artifact.
Obsidian Inquisition Seal (True) — Allows bearer to order one Inquisitorial Smite per week without Church approval. 25% purity.
Compendium of the Sixth — Book containing fragments of all 5 Sovereigns' deaths. Reading costs 1d10 Aether Burn, reveals one campaign secret. Unique.
God-Shroud Heavy Shield — +5 AC total, immune to Aether Burn, 1/long rest 5th-level cast. 90% purity. Priceless.

table_i.description: Artifact — CR 20+. Campaign-defining artifacts, God-Forged weapons, wishes/fates-altering items.

entries.item: God-Forged Greatsword (True Steel Blade) — +3 attack/damage, ignores all resistances, DC 18 CON or +3d6 elemental per hit, phases through non-living matter. 90% purity. Priceless.

The Crown of the First Sovereign — Wearer's blood purity becomes 100%. All Spell Safety DCs halved. 1/week cast Wish. Cursed: must make DC 20 WIS save weekly or be possessed by First Sovereign's echo.
God-Shroud Full Plate — +3 AC, immune to Aether Burn, 1/long rest free 5th-level cast. 90% purity. Priceless.
The Five-Skull Scepter — Cast any Cleric spell up to 7th level 3/day. 50% purity. Church of Five Skulls ultimate relic.
Void-Heart of Tenebris — Sovereign-Fragment core that regenerates. Grants +2d6 Void damage to all spells. 50% purity. Cursed: each use adds 1 permanent Aether Burn.
The Sky-Reaver (Vortex God-Forged Glaive) — +3 reach weapon, fly 60 ft. while wielded, 1/long rest cast Storm of Vengeance. 90% purity.
The Pyre-Heart Forge-Hammer — +3 warhammer, anything struck takes 4d6 fire and is instantly smelted. 90% purity. Ignis ultimate artifact.
The Obsidian Decree — Scroll containing True Resurrection. Cast once, then crumbles. Cannot be copied. Church sealed.
The Penitent's True Chains — Restraints that suppress blood purity to 0% in any bound creature. Used to bind a Sovereign. Unique.
The Stone-Blood Heart — Earth-element Sovereign-Fragment core. Implanted, transforms blood to stone. +4 CON, -4 DEX. 50% purity to survive implant. Unique.
The Shroud of the Sixth — Wearer becomes invisible to all divination magic. Cannot be detected by blood scans. 25% purity. Cult of the Sixth ultimate relic.
The Dragon-Garrison Banner — Standard that grants all allies within 300 ft. +2 to all saves. Unfurled, it declares war. Citadel's most guarded artifact.
The Aether Forge (Portable) — Can enchant any weapon/armor to God-Forged tier with 10 Sovereign-Fragment Cores. Weighs 500 lb. One of three in existence.
The Blood Mirror — Reveals true blood purity of any creature reflected in it. Ignores all magical concealment. Obsidian's most feared interrogation tool.
Sovereign-Egg (Living) — Contains a true Sovereign dragon. Hatches in 1d100 years... or 1d4 days if bathed in Pristine Aether-Cores. Imprints on first creature it sees.
The Sixth Seal-Breaker — Key that opens any lock sealed by the Church of Five Skulls. Leaves no trace. Cult of the Sixth artifact.
The Frost-Mourn Blade — +3 longsword, on hit target must DC 20 CON save or be frozen solid for 1 minute. 50% purity. Carved from the first Frost Sovereign's fang.
The Tome of Sovereign Blood — Records the lineage and location of every being with >50% purity alive. Updates magically. 25% purity to read. Priceless information.
The Eclipse Shard — A sliver of the dead moon. Negates all magic within 30 ft. when activated. 50% purity. Cannot distinguish friend from foe.
The Dragon-God's Tear — Single-use: fully restores any one creature to life with all conditions removed and blood purity raised to 100%. No Spell Safety check. Consumed on use. Unique.

Carved Dragon-Bone Dice

Silk Vortex Trade Cloth (bolt)

Sovereign-Era Gold Coin (pre-Crowns)
Deep-Blood Moonstone Pendant
Wyvern Egg (petrified, decorative)
Pristine Blood Crystal (functional, 99% accurate)
Platinum House Crown (archduke level)
Sovereign-Era Crown Fragment (pre-Five-Skulls)
